meaning: 奥伯豪森[德意志联邦共和国西部城市]
examples: Paul's home at Sea Life aquarium in Oberhausen has been inundated with visitors and media from across Europe.
The Oberhausen centre said he had seemed fine when last checked on Monday night but was found dead on Tuesday morning.
Staff at the Sea Life centre in Oberhausen said they were devastated to learn that he had passed away during the night.
They have opened Skechers stores in London, Paris and Oberhausen, Germany and may add 20 more cities in a few years.
